allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink.exe" -batch -agent root@143.244.206.168 "set -e; echo '=== OS ==='; lsb_release -a 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '=== NGINX ==='; nginx -v 2>&1; systemctl is-active nginx; echo; echo '=== NGINX CONFIGS ==='; ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>&1; echo; ls -la /etc/nginx/conf.d/ 2>&1; echo; echo '=== ACTIVE SERVERS ==='; nginx -T 2>&1 | grep -E 'server_name|listen|ssl_certificate ' | head -40; echo; echo '=== CERTBOT ==='; which certbot 2>&1; certbot --version 2>&1 || echo 'certbot not installed'; echo; echo '=== EXISTING CERTS ==='; ls -la /etc/letsencrypt/live/ 2>&1 || echo 'no letsencrypt dir'; echo; echo '=== DNS ==='; getent hosts naval-go.com www.naval-go.com 2>&1; echo; echo '=== FIREWALL ==='; ufw status 2>&1 | head -20; echo; echo '=== PORTS ==='; ss -tlnp 2>&1 | grep -E ':80|:443' ; echo; echo '=== WEBROOT ==='; ls /var/www/ 2>&1")

Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink.exe" -batch -agent root@143.244.206.168 "echo '=== CERT DETAILS ==='; certbot certificates 2>&1; echo; echo '=== ACTIVE WEB CONFIG ==='; cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/navalgo-web; echo; echo '=== ACTIVE API CONFIG ==='; cat /etc/nginx/sites-available/navalgo-api")

Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink.exe" -batch -agent root@143.244.206.168 'set -e; cd /etc/nginx/sites-available; mv navalgo-web navalgo-web.previous && mv navalgo-web.new navalgo-web; if nginx -t 2>&1; then echo "=== VALIDATION PASSED ==="; diff -u navalgo-web.previous navalgo-web | head -80; else echo "=== VALIDATION FAILED — REVERTING ==="; mv navalgo-web navalgo-web.failed && mv navalgo-web.previous navalgo-web; nginx -t 2>&1; exit 1; fi')
Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink.exe" -batch -agent root@143.244.206.168 'systemctl reload nginx && systemctl is-active nginx && echo "=== RELOAD OK ==="')

Bash("/c/Program Files/PuTTY/plink.exe" -batch -agent root@143.244.206.168 'set -e; cd /etc/nginx/sites-available; mv navalgo-web navalgo-web.previous && mv navalgo-web.new navalgo-web; if nginx -t 2>&1; then echo "=== VALIDATION PASSED ==="; systemctl reload nginx && echo "=== RELOAD OK ==="; else echo "=== VALIDATION FAILED — REVERTING ==="; mv navalgo-web navalgo-web.failed && mv navalgo-web.previous navalgo-web; nginx -t 2>&1; exit 1; fi')
